label: ILC2_3
evidence: The paper 10.1038/s41586-024-08002-x discusses group 2 innate lymphoid cells (ILC2) in the context of skin immune cell diversity, using the term 'ILC2' throughout the text and supplementary data. The suffix '_3' designates a fine-grained subcluster, but the resolved name per the authors is 'ILC2'. Mapping tables in the supplementary material confirm this usage.
